targets.query: from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1m) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "running") |> last()
from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "produced") |> last()
from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "defective") |> last()
from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "yield_pct") |> last()
from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "good") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last)
from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "defective") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: last)
from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "temp_stage1") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: mean)
from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "temp_stage2") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: mean)
from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "temp_stage3") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: mean)
from(bucket: "production") |> range(start: -1h) |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "production_metrics" and r._field == "temp_stage4") |> aggregateWindow(every: 5s, fn: mean)
